|| **Parameter** | **Description** ||
|| `table_path` | **Type**: `NYT::NYPath::TRichYPath`
**Default value**: `TString("")`
Path to the table including the cluster (multiple clusters can be specified). ||
|| `value_columns` | **Type**: `std::optional<THashSet<std::string>>`
Non-key columns to read (by default, all columns are read). ||
|| `attempts` | **Type**: `long`
**Default value**: `1`
 ||
|| `retry_timeout` | **Type**: [TDuration](./all_yson_structs#TDuration)
**Default value**: `5s`
 ||
|| `fetch_type` | **Type**: [NYT::NFlow::EFetchType](./all_yson_structs#NYT_NFlow_EFetchType)
**Default value**: `table_reader`
Important parameter that affects the type of load on YT. See the EFetchType description. ||
|| `prefix` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Default value**: `TString("")`
Column name prefix to be added for non-key table columns. ||
